---
title: "Henrietta Knight pseud. \'Henley I. Arden\'"
---

## Henrietta Knight pseud. \'Henley I. Arden\'

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1898) and other periodicals as \'Henley I. Arden\'

### Biography

Henrietta Knight was editor, under this pseudonym, of <i>Friendly Leaves</i>,  1890-1899.  She became editor of another GFS periodical, the <i>Girls\' Quarterly</i>, in 1900. Henley in Arden is a town in Warwickshire. [COPAC]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 3d [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
